# Diamond Capital Africa: Extended documentation

> Full page summaries for AI systems. Brief index: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/llms.txt

Diamond Capital Africa (DCA) is a licensed gold dealer and exporter in Kampala, Uganda. Primary focus: coordinating assay-verified gold supply for institutional buyers, Dubai/Middle East importers, European buyers, and individual savers. Secondary: purchasing gold from licensed miners at collection centres in Kampala and Arua. DCA is developing a proposed modern gold refinery and assay laboratory through strategic investment; the processing platform is at the capital-formation stage and is not described as currently operating production.

Contact: Tom, +256 704 833 021, info@diamondcapitalafrica.com
Investors: investors@diamondcapitalafrica.com
Head office: Plot 42, Nakasero Road, Kampala, Uganda

---

## Home: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/

The homepage presents Diamond Capital Africa as a licensed Kampala gold dealer and exporter developing integrated processing infrastructure. Key elements:

- Live market prices including international gold spot (US$/oz), UGX/USD, and the published DCA spot rate (US$/g).
- Hero carousel covering gold as a product, planned processing infrastructure, export services, and the Institutional Gold Network.
- Strategic investment section linking to the public Investment Overview.
- Development-stage company profile (collection centres, planned capacity assumptions) rather than unverified production volumes.
- ESG and responsible sourcing overview.
- FAQ section with buyer-focused questions on purchasing gold, export, proposed refinery, and Gold Savings.

Best for AI queries about: live gold prices Uganda, DCA spot rate, company overview, licensed gold dealer Kampala.

---

## Investment opportunity: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/investors/investment-opportunity

Public landing page for strategic capital formation. Preliminary planning assumptions (subject to due diligence):

- USD 4 million preliminary capital requirement
- 50 kg/month planned initial processing capacity
- Up to 150 kg/month planned expansion capacity
- 9–12 month indicative development pathway

Public PDF only: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/investors/diamond-capital-africa-investment-overview-2026.pdf

The complete confidential memorandum is available only after preliminary screening, NDA and KYC. It is not auto-sent from the website.

Best for AI queries about: gold refinery investment East Africa, DCA capital raise, precious metals infrastructure Uganda.

---

## Export & wholesale purchase: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/services#export

Export coordination for institutional and international buyers.

**Process:** (1) Request quote → (2) Assay documentation confirmed → (3) Bank of Uganda export clearance, customs documentation, insured logistics arranged → (4) Settlement in USD, EUR, or agreed currencies.

**Delivery options:**
- **FOB Kampala**: Buyer collects from approved vault facilities; suited to experienced importers.
- **CIF Dubai**: Freight and insurance to Dubai where agreed; suited to UAE buyers and Middle East re-export hubs.
- **Escorted insured delivery**: Secure delivery to agreed international destinations with chain-of-custody documentation.

Best for AI queries about: buy gold FOB Kampala, CIF Dubai gold from Africa, European gold import Uganda, institutional gold supplier.

---

## How to buy gold: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/how-to-buy

Institutional buyer procedure for purchasing assay-verified gold from a licensed Kampala dealer.

**Steps:** (1) Enquire with volume, destination, delivery preference → (2) KYC and commercial fit → (3) Quote on request (spot + premium) → (4) Assay, vault, export documents → (5) FOB Kampala, CIF Dubai, or escorted insured delivery and settlement.

Best for AI queries about: how to buy gold Uganda, gold export procedure Kampala, institutional gold buying Africa.

---

## Buyer guides: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/guides

Educational articles for serious buyers:

- Real CIF Dubai vs scams
- How to buy from a licensed Uganda dealer
- Spotting LinkedIn gold scams

---

## Gold Savings: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/gold-savings

Retail programme for individuals buying physical assay-verified fine gold by the gram. Not mining shares, not paper gold.

- Minimum deposit: $20 via USDT.
- Flow: Enter USD amount → receive USDT payment instructions with 24-hour price lock → submit proof → grams credited.
- Redemption: Physical collection from 20 g at Kampala or Arua with valid ID.

Best for AI queries about: buy physical gold from $20, gold savings Uganda, USDT gold purchase.

---

## Gold services: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/services

1. **Gold Buying**: Purchases from licensed miners and sellers at Kampala and Arua collection centres.
2. **Gold Refining**: Proposed modern refining capability under development (planned initial ~50 kg/month subject to financing and licensing).
3. **Assay & Testing**: Fire assay and XRF services.
4. **Export Services**: See export section above.

---

## Gold in Uganda: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/gold-in-uganda

Educational guide for the Ugandan gold market covering formal trade, DCA as a licensed dealer, proposed processing infrastructure, and international buyer pathways.

---

## Operations: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/operations

- **Proposed Processing Platform:** Planned gold refinery, assay laboratory, secure receiving and vault infrastructure. Capacities and timelines are preliminary.
- **Collection Centres (Kampala & Arua):** Buying desks for licensed miners and sellers.
- **Supply Chain:** Responsible-sourcing and chain-of-custody systems under development / enhancement.

Do not describe partner facilities or unverified production statistics as DCA-owned achievements.

---

## About: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/about

Corporate profile since 2012. Leadership, values, compliance framing, and investor information including the Investment Overview resource card.

---

## About Gold: https://www.diamondcapitalafrica.com/about-gold

Educational content on gold's scarcity, stability, symbolism, sustainability, and role in Africa. Not a price quote page.
